items.name: FloatConfig
items.comment: Vertical motion applied to each timed word.

fields.name: enabled
fields.comment: Whether timed words float while they are sung.

fields.name: from
fields.comment: Starting vertical offset in logical pixels.

fields.name: to
fields.comment: Ending vertical offset in logical pixels.

items.name: MaskFeatherConfig
items.comment: Soft-edge sizing of the karaoke reveal mask.

fields.name: normal
fields.comment: Base feather width as a multiple of word height.

fields.name: first
fields.comment: Feather multiplier for the first word.

fields.name: last
fields.comment: Feather multiplier for the last word.

fields.name: enabled
fields.comment: Whether active words reveal progressively instead of switching immediately.

fields.name: feather
fields.comment: Soft-edge sizing of the reveal boundary.
